title: TruthFul PVP Pack
description: This is a PVP Resource Pack for Minecraft 1.8.9
body:
# TRUTHFUL - Clean, Crisp, and Made for Clutches

TruthFul is a Minecraft 1.8.9 PvP-focused resource pack, built especially for Bedwars sweats and clutch kings. Inspired by the sleek Midnight PvP Pack, TruthFul gives your game a clean and refreshing visual upgrade—no distractions, just crystal-clear textures for better gameplay and better plays.

## 🔥 What’s Re-Textured?

We've reworked the visuals of the most-used Bedwars items to give you that smooth, no-noise PvP experience:

-    🧶 Wool – easy to spot, clean to place

-    💰 Iron, Gold, Diamond, Emerald – instantly recognizable drops

-    🗡️ Swords & Pickaxes – short, sharp, and clean animations

-    🧱 Obsidian, Wood, Endstone, Stone – redesigned for faster bridging and base defense

Whether you're grinding solos or running with the squad, TruthFul is made to help you stay focused and stylish while clutching up.
